name: Andorhal Granary District
region: Inside Andorhal, between the main grain towers and their loading passages

sensoryProfile.sight: Covered passages between grain towers, supervisors' booths, handcarts, flour-glazed stone, shuttered windows, and an off-ledger building tucked between the second and third towers.
sensoryProfile.sound: Receipt slates, cart wheels, loaders barking at each other, and the wrong quiet around workers who wait too still.
sensoryProfile.smell: Cold flour, damp chaff, old grit in the drain channel, and the dense mill smell of a district that never really stops working.
sensoryProfile.touch: Stone slicked with grain dust, newer metal on an older lock, and mud in the rear lane that keeps the memory of night cart tracks.
sensoryProfile.atmosphere: Industrial routine stretched tight over hidden discipline. Everything here looks like labor until watched closely.

establishedFacts.fact: Three contaminated receipt points sit inside this district.
At least eight hidden cultists operate here, with two apparent local leaders who redirect the others without carrying loads themselves.
An off-ledger building between the second and third towers is being used for the treatment work, with a newer lock and night cart access through the east lane.

eventsHere.event: Sylvanas and Havel map the hidden district cell while Jaina and Corin isolate the contamination mechanism.
The district becomes the basis for a same-night split operation: building read, perimeter hold, and live capture.
